title: Circuit Overview
discoveryHint: Craft circuit components to learn about circuits.

sections.text: Each voltage tier has corresponding circuits. The first circuits are Vacuum Tube-based (ULV). LV circuits use Electronic Circuits on Coated Circuit Boards. MV uses Good Electronic Circuits. Each tier has multiple circuit levels with varying costs and complexity.

Circuit crafting has four key components: the Board (base substrate), passive components (Resistors, Capacitors, Inductors), active components (Vacuum Tubes, Diodes, Transistors, SMDs), and soldering. Higher-tier circuits need the Circuit Assembler machine.
